overall.description: A stationary cinematic shot from a video game depicting a circular gothic divination classroom with stone walls, red drapery, and glowing crystal balls on tables. A robed figure stands near the left wall throughout, while a small character enters from the right and crosses the room toward the end of the clip.

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a circular gothic classroom with stone walls, red velvet curtains, and multiple tables holding glowing crystal balls. An iron chandelier hangs from the ceiling providing warm candlelight, and a robed figure stands motionless near the left wall. The room features arched windows and an ornate circular rug in the center.

segments.scene_description: The scene continues in the same divination classroom. A small character enters from the right side of the frame and walks across the ornate rug toward the central table, while the robed figure remains stationary on the left. The crystal balls continue to glow softly, and the warm candlelight from the chandelier maintains the mystical atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary view of a mystical gothic classroom that transforms from a still, atmospheric interior into a scene of quiet activity. It begins with a wide look at the circular room, where warm candlelight from an iron chandelier illuminates stone walls, red velvet curtains, and glowing crystal balls resting on tables. As the camera holds its position, the stillness of the robed figure standing by the left wall is contrasted by the arrival of a small character. This figure enters from the right and walks across the ornate central rug toward the middle table, while the soft glow of the crystals maintains the room's arcane mood. The scene finally settles as the character reaches the center of the room, completing the transition from a vacant sanctuary to a lived-in space.
